etymology.description: 𡍬 (phonetic) + 貝 (cowry) -> 𧸇 -> 士 and 四 replacing 𡍬 -> final form 𧶠
etymology.interpretation: The character 𧶠 is a phono-semantic compound where 𡍬 provides the phonetic component while 貝(bèi, "cowry") signifies value or trade. Over time, 𡍬 was simplified through reduction into the components 士(shì, "scholar") and 四(sì, "four") to arrive at the modern form 𧶠, which still retains the semantic meaning of trade or selling.
